title: cyclaminus graeca
intro: Cyclaminus graeca, also known as Hellebore, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cyclaminus graeca include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism and arthritis, and even act as an antiseptic to treat wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects, although caution is advised due to its potential toxicity.
